note: Counterfactual server prices, USD per 1M tokens. Prices change; each row is dated (price_as_of) and carries a source. verified:false = not confirmed against the provider's official pricing page (figure is best-known/recalled) — the UI should invite the user to override. Never treat these as authoritative billing rates.
